'''鈭歵h-s-ch''' ('''kathasach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:braise|braise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:braise|braise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-s-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kathasach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithasach|thithasach]] || [[word:jithasach|jithasach]] || [[word:shithasach|shithasach]] || [[word:kithasach|kithasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthasach|thuthuthasach]] || [[word:jujuthasach|jujuthasach]] || [[word:shushuthasach|shushuthasach]] || [[word:kukuthasach|kukuthasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthasach|thuthasach]] || [[word:juthasach|juthasach]] || [[word:shuthasach|shuthasach]] || [[word:kuthasach|kuthasach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthasach|thuthasach]] || [[word:juthasach|juthasach]] || [[word:shuthasach|shuthasach]] || [[word:kuthasach|kuthasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethasach|thethasach]] || [[word:jethasach|jethasach]] || [[word:shethasach|shethasach]] || [[word:kethasach|kethasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothasach|thothothasach]] || [[word:jojothasach|jojothasach]] || [[word:shoshothasach|shoshothasach]] || [[word:kokothasach|kokothasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothasach|thothasach]] || [[word:jothasach|jothasach]] || [[word:shothasach|shothasach]] || [[word:kothasach|kothasach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothasach|thothasach]] || [[word:jothasach|jothasach]] || [[word:shothasach|shothasach]] || [[word:kothasach|kothasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]] || [[word:thasach|thasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thasach|th忙thasach]] || [[word:j忙thasach|j忙thasach]] || [[word:sh忙thasach|sh忙thasach]] || [[word:k忙thasach|k忙thasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathasach|thathathasach]] || [[word:jajathasach|jajathasach]] || [[word:shashathasach|shashathasach]] || [[word:kakathasach|kakathasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathasach|thathasach]] || [[word:jathasach|jathasach]] || [[word:shathasach|shathasach]] || [[word:kathasach|kathasach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathasach|thathasach]] || [[word:jathasach|jathasach]] || [[word:shathasach|shathasach]] || [[word:kathasach|kathasach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathasach|shathasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathasach|goshathasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathasach|gokishathasach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathasachn眉|shathasachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathasachnkn眉|goshathasachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathasachn眉|gokishathasachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathasachsh毛|shathasachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathasachnksh毛|goshathasachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathasachsh毛|gokishathasachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathasachro|shathasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathasachnkro|goshathasachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathasachro|gokishathasachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathasachmu|shathasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathasachnkmu|goshathasachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathasachmu|gokishathasachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathasachsher|shathasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathasachnksher|goshathasachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathasachsher|gokishathasachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathasachng|shathasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathasachnkng|goshathasachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathasachng|gokishathasachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathasachya|shathasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathasachnkya|goshathasachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathasachya|gokishathasachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathasachyam|shathasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathasachnkyam|goshathasachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathasachyam|gokishathasachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathasachn眉sh毛|shathasachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathasachnkn眉sh毛|goshathasachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathasachn眉sh毛|gokishathasachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathasachn眉ro|shathasachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathasachnkn眉ro|goshathasachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathasachn眉ro|gokishathasachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathasachn眉mu|shathasachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathasachnkn眉mu|goshathasachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathasachn眉mu|gokishathasachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathasachsh毛n眉|shathasachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathasachnksh毛n眉|goshathasachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathasachsh毛n眉|gokishathasachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathasachsh毛ro|shathasachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathasachnksh毛ro|goshathasachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathasachsh毛ro|gokishathasachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathasachsh毛mu|shathasachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathasachnksh毛mu|goshathasachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathasachsh毛mu|gokishathasachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathasachron眉|shathasachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathasachnkron眉|goshathasachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathasachron眉|gokishathasachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathasachrosh毛|shathasachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathasachnkrosh毛|goshathasachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathasachrosh毛|gokishathasachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathasachromu|shathasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathasachnkromu|goshathasachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathasachromu|gokishathasachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathasachmun眉|shathasachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathasachnkmun眉|goshathasachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathasachmun眉|gokishathasachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathasachmush毛|shathasachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathasachnkmush毛|goshathasachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathasachmush毛|gokishathasachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathasachmuro|shathasachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathasachnkmuro|goshathasachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathasachmuro|gokishathasachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
